title: Version 2.1.50 Released
description: Added support for startupTimeout configuration for LSP servers, WorktreeCreate and WorktreeRemove hook events for VCS setup/teardown. Fixed critical bugs: resumed sessions visibility with symlinks, session data loss on SSH disconnect, memory leaks in agent teams and LSP diagnostics, and native module loading on older glibc systems. Added isolation: worktree support for agents and CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT environment variable. Opus 4.6 fast mode now includes full 1M context window.

community_feedback.quote: 高强度使用claude code/code agent的三个月的感想和思考 - users praise autonomous code generation, debugging, and prototyping capabilities
Claude Code的GitHub public commit share reached 4%, expected to exceed 20% by end of 2026

title: Version 2.1.49 Released
description: Fixed Ctrl+C and ESC being ignored when background agents running, prompt suggestion cache regression, and plugin scope auto-detection. Simple mode now includes file edit tool. Sonnet 4.5 with 1M context removed from Max plan in favor of Sonnet 4.6 with 1M context. Fixed verbose mode updates, unbounded WASM memory growth, and improved non-interactive mode performance.

title: Version 1.3.32 for VSCode Released
description: Latest pre-release of Continue VSCode extension with platform-specific builds for Alpine-x64, Darwin-arm64, Linux-arm64, Linux-x64, and Windows-x64 architectures. Extension size approximately 79MB.

community_feedback.quote: Continue is an open-source AI code assistant for VSCode that provides GitHub Copilot-like functionality with support for local models via Ollama

title: Version 0.86.0 Released
description: Added support for all GPT-5 models, Grok-4 via xai, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite Preview, and OpenRouter Kimi K2. Improved /clear and /undo command output, fixed model settings replacement, and upgraded PostHog SDK. Aider wrote 88% of the code in this release.

title: Model Picker for GitHub Mobile
description: GitHub Mobile released a model picker feature for Copilot coding agent, available for Copilot Pro and Pro+ users. Enhanced symbol context finding tools for improved code understanding.

title: File Reading Functionality Optimized
description: Major optimization of file reading functionality, improving experience from exception-prone to smooth operation. Integrated fixes into latest version with complete changelog available. Team plans further enhancements including binary file preview and incremental reading support.
